summary: Closed Caption setting is saved after app close and relaunch
description:
GIVEN a user has an MLB.tv account
AND the user is logged in

steps.action:
WHEN the user sets Closed Captions on the Settings page to ON
AND the user closes the app
AND the user relaunches the app
AND the user navigates to the Settings page
steps.result: THEN Closed Captions is set to ON

steps.action:
WHEN the user sets Closed Captions on the Settings page to OFF
AND the user closes the app
AND the user relaunches the app
AND the user navigates to the Settings page
steps.result: THEN the Closed Captions is set to OFF
